name: Serverless Architecture
description: A serverless (Function-as-a-Service) architecture leveraging cloud-managed compute, storage, and integration services. Functions are triggered by events from API gateways, message queues, or storage changes. The cloud provider manages infrastructure, scaling, and patching, shifting the security focus to IAM policies, function isolation, and data protection.

zones.name: external
zones.description: All external actors and event sources including end users, partner systems, and automated webhook triggers originating from outside the cloud account boundary.

zones.name: edge
zones.description: The cloud edge layer providing content delivery, API management, request routing, and initial authorization. Managed services handle TLS, throttling, and request transformation.

zones.name: compute
zones.description: The ephemeral compute layer where business logic executes in isolated function invocations. Each function has a defined IAM role with least-privilege access to other cloud resources.

zones.name: data-tier
zones.description: The managed data persistence layer including NoSQL tables, object storage, relational databases, and caching layers. All data is encrypted at rest using customer-managed or service-managed keys.

zones.name: managed-services
zones.description: Cloud-managed integration and observability services used for asynchronous messaging, user authentication, monitoring, and tracing. Access governed by IAM policies.

mermaid_template:
flowchart TB
    subgraph external["External (Untrusted)"]
        user[End User / Browser]
        mobile[Mobile Client]
        webhook[External Webhook]
    end
    subgraph edge["Edge (Semi-Trusted)"]
        cdn(CDN / WAF)
        apigw(API Gateway)
        authz(Custom Authorizer)
    end
    subgraph compute["Compute (Trusted)"]
        fn1(Function A)
        fn2(Function B)
        fn3(Function C)
        step(Step Functions / Orchestrator)
    end
    subgraph data["Data Tier (Highly Trusted)"]
        dynamo[(DynamoDB)]
        s3[(S3 Bucket)]
        rds[(RDS / Aurora)]
    end
    subgraph managed["Managed Services (Trusted)"]
        sqs([SQS Queue])
        sns([SNS Topic])
        cognito(Cognito User Pool)
        cw(CloudWatch / X-Ray)
    end
    user -->|HTTPS| cdn
    mobile -->|HTTPS| cdn
    cdn --> apigw
    webhook -->|HTTPS| apigw
    apigw --> authz
    authz -->|IAM Role| fn1
    apigw -->|IAM Role| fn2
    sqs -->|Event Trigger| fn3
    fn1 --> step
    step --> fn2
    step --> fn3
    fn1 -->|IAM Policy| dynamo
    fn2 -->|IAM Policy| s3
    fn3 -->|IAM Policy| rds
    fn1 --> sqs
    fn2 --> sns
    fn1 -.-> cw
    apigw -.-> cognito
